subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the mention of God! That which hath been written by the Pen of devotion upon the tablet of fidelity hath become manifest and evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بذکر الله آنچه از کلک ولا بر صفحه وفا مرقوم مشهود و معلوم گردید حمد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
